qa_pairs.question: What is the purpose of RAP membership within the Alliance system?
qa_pairs.answer: RAP membership, represented as a group in LDAP, defines a group of users authorized to submit jobs against a Resource Allocation Project Identifier (RAPI) and share files within the same Unix group.

qa_pairs.question: When submitting a job to the scheduler on Trillium, what action must a user take if they are associated with multiple Principal Investigators (PIs) or groups?
qa_pairs.answer: If a user is associated with more than one Principal Investigator (PI) or group when submitting a job to the Trillium scheduler, they must specify a group name as the value for the `--account` option.
